nasb.text: And the anger of the Lord burned against Uzzah, and God struck him down there for his irreverence; and he died there by the ark of God.

esv.text: And the anger of the Lord was kindled against Uzzah, and God struck him down there because of his error, and he died there beside the ark of God.

cnv.text: 耶和華的怒氣向烏撒發作；　神因這錯誤的舉動，就當場擊殺他，他就死在　神的約櫃旁邊。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝就向乌撒发怒，因他的不敬而击杀了他。他死在了约柜旁边。
